tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
    delete 2
    delete 3
end
config firewall address
    delete "DNS-Resolver-1"
    delete "DNS-Resolver-2"
end
config firewall address
    edit "Approved-DNS-Resolvers"
        set subnet 192.168.1.1 255.255.255.255
    next
end
config firewall policy
    edit 0
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Allow-DNS-Resolvers"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "Approved-DNS-Resolvers"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 0
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Deny-Other-DNS"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action deny
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS"
    next
end
config firewall policy
    move 2 before 100
    move 3 before 100
end
show firewall policy"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
    delete 2
    delete 3
end
config firewall addrgrp
    delete "Approved-DNS-Resolvers"
end
config firewall address
    edit "DNS-Resolver-1"
        set subnet 192.168.1.1 255.255.255.255
    next
end
config firewall addrgrp
    edit "Approved-DNS-Resolvers"
        set member "DNS-Resolver-1"
    next
end
config firewall policy
    edit 0
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Allow-DNS-Resolvers"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "Approved-DNS-Resolvers"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 0
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Deny-Other-DNS"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action deny
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS"
    next
end
config firewall policy
    move 3 before 100
    move 2 before 3
end
show firewall policy"}
